description_long: This object consists of three minivans positioned side by side, each with a distinct color and design. The minivans feature a boxy, utilitarian shape with gently rounded edges, typical of urban family vehicles. The exteriors display prominent front grilles, large windshields, and side windows that extend along the length of the vehicles. The wheels are visible beneath the body, and the rear ends are squared off, suggesting ample cargo space. The paint finishes appear to be a mix of dark and neutral tones, with some reflective surfaces indicating a glossy finish. The overall proportions and details suggest these are scale models of real-world minivans, designed for use in urban environments.
description: A set of three detailed minivans with boxy shapes, large windows, and glossy dark finishes, positioned side by side. Each minivan features prominent grilles, visible wheels, and realistic urban styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grilles, headlights, and windshields of all three minivans.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the length, side windows, and wheels of the minivans.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillights, rear windows, and squared-off backs of the minivans.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the side profiles and wheels, but from the other direction.
attribute_window_configuration: Large front windshield, two side windows per side, and a rear window on each minivan.
